items.title: Trump Media to sell early access to key social posts
items.dek: Trump Media is launching a fast, paid feed to its most influential posts for Wall Street traders.
items.body: Trump Media is launching a fast, paid feed to its most influential posts for Wall Street traders.

items.title: School bus crash kills at least 20 pupils in Uganda
items.dek: Dozens others, including school staff, were injured in the crash, suspected to have been caused by a mechanical fault.
items.body: Dozens others, including school staff, were injured in the crash, suspected to have been caused by a mechanical fault.
